title: Bushy Grass (Saturated)
description: Resourcepack updates the grass block model, adding small blades of grass.
body:
# Bushy Grass Resourcepack !


Updates the grass block model by adding smaller blades of grass and improving the overall appearance.![before/after](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/903d1ca83a8fbc7cc3aacfccc886e5f50b44f9ee.jpeg)
## Additional information

- RP also updates the colormap, increasing the saturation of fooliage
- It is highly recommended to play with shaders for a more beautiful picture
